headline: Natural language drives the entire build surface
subheadline: MyAppAI turns operator prompts into routed tasks across content, scripts, workers, commits, sync, and Cloudflare-ready deployment flows.

sections.title: Command-first execution
sections.description: Translate plain-language or structured prompts into validated tasks before anything touches the repo, dashboard, or deploy chain.

sections.title: System-wide AI orchestration
sections.description: Coordinate code changes, content generation, script execution, resource management, and worker automation from one operator-facing shell.

sections.title: Deploy from source control
sections.description: Every accepted mutation can flow into staging, commit history, remote sync, and Cloudflare rebuilds with deployment telemetry attached.
